channel.title: Pwn on Zerofrost
channel.description: Recent content in Pwn on Zerofrost

item.title: Africa Bug Pwn 2024 Writeups
item.description: Recently I took part in the Africa Bug Pwn 2024 Capture the Flag Competition and managed to get second position with 2310 points. The CTF was very interesting and I got to learn a thing or two. This blog post will be a writeup of some of the challenges I managed to solve.

item.title: ImaginaryCTF Argv Pwn Writeup
item.description:
Introduction

This blog post is a walkthrough of an interesting pwn challenge I came across in the imaginary ctf discord challenge.
